assertions.title: NDJSON framing serializes and deserializes correctly

steps.expected: Client notification serializes to single JSON line without newline, containing method name
steps.observed: Test passed — serialized cancel notification contains 'cancel', no embedded newline, starts with JSON-RPC header

steps.expected: Two session/update notifications in single byte stream decode as separate messages
steps.observed: Test passed — decoded >=2 messages from concatenated input

steps.expected: Empty and whitespace-only lines return Skipped without error
steps.observed: Test passed — empty and whitespace-only lines skipped with 'empty' reason

steps.expected: Invalid JSON returns Skipped, subsequent valid line still decodes
steps.observed: Test passed — 'not valid json {{{' skipped with 'invalid JSON' reason, valid line after it decoded as AgentNotification

assertions.title: NDJSON framing handles partial messages across reads

steps.expected: Message split at midpoint still decodes correctly via BufReader
steps.observed: Test passed — partial message buffered and decoded successfully

steps.expected: 150KB JSON message serializes and deserializes without buffer overflow
steps.observed: Test passed — large message with 150,000-char payload decoded successfully

assertions.title: Mock transport enables in-memory ACP message exchange

steps.expected: Queued response can be read through NdjsonReader
steps.observed: Test passed — queued session/update response read and decoded successfully

steps.expected: Client notification written to transport is captured for inspection
steps.observed: Test passed — captured output contains 'cancel' and ends with newline

steps.expected: After disconnect, reads return StreamClosed, is_disconnected returns true
steps.observed: Test passed — StreamClosed error after disconnect, disconnect state confirmed

steps.expected: >100KB text payload serialized as single NDJSON line and deserialized without buffer overflow
steps.observed: Test passed — 150,000-char payload in session/update message decoded successfully

steps.expected: Emoji and multi-byte UTF-8 characters round-trip through NDJSON framing without corruption
steps.observed: Test passed — 'Hello 🌍🎉🦀' payload in session/update decoded successfully

steps.expected: Binary content (0x01 0x02 0x03) is skipped without panic
steps.observed: Test passed — binary garbage line returned as Skipped variant

steps.expected: Null bytes in stream are detected and line is skipped without panic
steps.observed: Test passed — line containing null byte skipped with 'null byte in line' reason

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-ACP-011, VAL-ACP-012, VAL-ACP-018, VAL-ACP-020, VAL-ACP-021, VAL-ACP-022): all 6 passed. Total tests executed: 29 framing tests + 9 mock transport tests = 38 tests, 0 failures. Evidence saved to evidence/acp-client/framing-group/.
